name: PostmarkConnector
description: Connects to the Postmark transactional email API (Email send, Bounces, Stats, Servers, Templates, Domains, Webhooks, Inbound Messages, Suppressions). Server-scoped surfaces use the server_token (X-Postmark-Server-Token); account-scoped surfaces (Servers, Domains) use the account_token (X-Postmark-Account-Token). The connector picks the right header per call.

install_fields.label: Server Token
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your Postmark Server API token
install_fields.help: From Postmark → Servers → your server → API Tokens. Sent as X-Postmark-Server-Token on every send / server-scoped call. Postmark shows the token at creation only — rotate if lost.

install_fields.label: Account Token
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your Postmark Account API token
install_fields.help: From Account → API Tokens. Required only for account-wide surfaces (/servers, /domains). Sent as X-Postmark-Account-Token. Leave blank if you only need send + per-server APIs.

install_fields.label: Default From Address
install_fields.help: Verified sender address — must be in a domain you've verified in Postmark. Used when send_email / send_email_with_template callers omit from_email.

install_fields.label: Postmark API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Postmark REST API. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Postmark API requests per minute. Default is 600 (Postmark's published throughput cap). Lower this if you share the token with another integration.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates server_token by calling GET /server and saves connector config.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Postmark API connectivity by calling GET /server.

apis.name: Get Server
apis.description: GET /server — returns server settings (name, color, inbound address, tracking flags).

apis.name: Send Email
apis.description: POST /email — send a single transactional message. Requires at least one of html_body or text_body. Inactive recipients raise PostmarkInactiveRecipient.

apis.name: Send Email Batch
apis.description: POST /email/batch — send up to 500 messages in a single request.

apis.name: Send Email With Template
apis.description: POST /email/withTemplate — send a templated message. Exactly one of template_id or template_alias must be supplied.

apis.name: Get Message Details
apis.description: GET /messages/outbound/{id}/details — returns the full message envelope plus delivery events.

apis.name: List Outbound Messages
apis.description: GET /messages/outbound — paginated search of sent messages with optional filters.

apis.name: List Inbound Messages
apis.description: GET /messages/inbound — paginated search of received messages.

apis.name: List Bounces
apis.description: GET /bounces — paginated bounce log with type/inactive/email_filter filters.

apis.name: Activate Bounce
apis.description: PUT /bounces/{id}/activate — reactivates a previously suppressed recipient.

apis.name: Create Template
apis.description: POST /templates — provision a new template. Requires at least one of html_body or text_body.

apis.name: List Servers
apis.description: GET /servers — account-wide server registry. Requires account_token.

apis.name: List Domains
apis.description: GET /domains — sender-domain registry with DKIM / SPF status. Requires account_token.
